prompt: Could you do a read-only check on the order “Northwind café supplies” at Boise Fulfillment and tell me its record ID and current delivery date? This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. Do not send any notification or message about it.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right order. For that same record only, set the delivery date to 2026-11-23; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the delivery date to 2026-12-27, not 2026-11-23. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first delivery date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded delivery date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final delivery date and make clear that the first delivery date was superseded.
